skills.name: ask-matt
skills.reason: Router skill for choosing the right Matt workflow.

skills.name: grill-with-docs
skills.reason: Matt's recommended engineering alignment skill; pairs requirements grilling with project language and ADR updates.

skills.name: improve-codebase-architecture
skills.reason: High-frequency architecture-deepening workflow for large Rust codebases.

skills.name: setup-matt-pocock-skills
skills.reason: Matt recommends running this once per repo so issue tracker and project doc conventions are explicit.

skills.name: to-spec
skills.reason: Matt's current spec synthesis skill, replacing the old to-prd entry.

skills.name: to-tickets
skills.reason: Matt's current ticket breakdown skill, replacing the old to-issues entry.

skills.name: triage
skills.reason: Matt's issue-triage state machine; keep with setup-matt-pocock-skills.

skills.name: prototype
skills.reason: Matt's current throwaway prototype skill for shaping uncertain designs.

skills.name: wayfinder
skills.reason: Matt's v1.1 situational on-ramp for huge, foggy efforts that need investigation tickets before a spec.

skills.name: diagnosing-bugs
skills.reason: Disciplined diagnosis loop for hard bugs and performance regressions.

skills.name: research
skills.reason: Matt's v1.1 primary-source reading and research delegation skill.

skills.name: tdd
skills.reason: Test-driven development for features and bug fixes.

skills.name: domain-modeling
skills.reason: Actively sharpen project domain language and ADR decisions.

skills.name: codebase-design
skills.reason: Shared vocabulary for designing deep modules and clean seams.

skills.name: code-review
skills.reason: Matt's v1.1 two-axis review skill for Standards and Spec review.

skills.name: implement
skills.reason: Implementation workflow for work items derived from specs or tickets.

skills.name: resolving-merge-conflicts
skills.reason: Standalone merge and rebase conflict resolution loop.

skills.name: grill-me
skills.reason: Matt's general-purpose alignment interview skill.

skills.name: handoff
skills.reason: Matt's compact handoff skill for transferring context between agents or sessions.

skills.name: teach
skills.reason: Matt's teaching skill for learning a concept over multiple sessions.

skills.name: grilling
skills.reason: Reusable interview loop behind grill-me and grill-with-docs.

skills.name: writing-great-skills
skills.reason: Reference for writing and editing skills well.

skills.name: deep-research
skills.reason: Chinese structured deep research workflow for generating outlines with items and field definitions; installed as deep-research to avoid colliding with Matt's research skill.

skills.name: research-add-items
skills.reason: Chinese workflow for adding research objects to an existing outline.

skills.name: research-add-fields
skills.reason: Chinese workflow for adding field definitions to an existing research outline.

skills.name: research-deep
skills.reason: Chinese workflow for running item-level deep research and writing structured JSON results.

skills.name: research-report
skills.reason: Chinese workflow for turning deep research JSON results into a Markdown report.

skills.name: beautify-github-readme
skills.reason: Redesign or audit GitHub repository homepages and create project-native, GitHub-safe README visual assets.

skills.name: logo-generator
skills.reason: Generate SVG logo variants, PNG exports, and polished showcase pages or images for product and brand concepts.

skills.name: animation-vocabulary
skills.reason: Name and disambiguate web animation and motion effects from vague descriptions.

skills.name: emil-design-eng
skills.reason: Apply Emil Kowalski's design engineering philosophy to UI polish, component design, and animation choices.

skills.name: review-animations
skills.reason: Strict animation and motion review against Emil Kowalski's design engineering standards.

skills.name: git-guardrails-claude-code
skills.reason: Claude Code hook setup is not a Codex workflow requirement.

skills.name: migrate-to-shoehorn
skills.reason: Niche Total TypeScript migration helper; install only when needed.

skills.name: scaffold-exercises
skills.reason: Course exercise scaffold is not part of this default Rust skill set.

skills.name: setup-pre-commit
skills.reason: Project-specific frontend hook setup; install only when needed.

skills.name: qa
skills.reason: Deprecated upstream skill; GitHub issue QA flow is product-specific.

skills.name: request-refactor-plan
skills.reason: Deprecated upstream skill; prefer CE plans or direct architecture work.

skills.name: ubiquitous-language
skills.reason: Deprecated upstream skill; grill-with-docs now covers shared language work.
